# Instructions

- Following Playwright test failed.
- Explain why, be concise, respect Playwright best practices.
- Provide a snippet of code with the fix, if possible.

# Test info

- Name: sprint3-rewards.spec.js >> Sprint 3: Promotion Rewards & Credit System (5 Cases) >> TC-REWARD-001/002: Full Lifecycle - Opt-in, Report, and PM Approval
- Location: tests/e2e/sprint3-rewards.spec.js:18:7

# Error details

```
Error: dialog.accept: Cannot accept dialog which is already handled!
```

```
Error: page.waitForTimeout: Test ended.
```


# Test source

```ts
  1   | import { test, expect } from '@playwright/test';
  2   | import testData from '../config/test-data.json';
  3   | 
  4   | const { baseUrl, password, accounts } = testData;
  5   | 
  6   | test.describe('Sprint 3: Promotion Rewards & Credit System (5 Cases)', () => {
  7   |   test.describe.configure({ mode: 'serial' });
  8   |   
  9   |   async function login(page, email, password) {
  10  |     await page.goto(`${baseUrl}/login`);
  11  |     await page.fill('input[name="email"]', email);
  12  |     await page.fill('input[name="password"]', password);
  13  |     await page.click('button:has-text("Sign In")');
  14  |     await expect(page.locator('text=Loading')).toBeHidden({ timeout: 15000 });
  15  |     await expect(page).not.toHaveURL(/.*login/);
  16  |   }
  17  | 
  18  |   test('TC-REWARD-001/002: Full Lifecycle - Opt-in, Report, and PM Approval', async ({ page }) => {
  19  |     // 1. Retailer navigates to promotions
  20  |     await login(page, accounts.retailer1.email, password);
  21  |     await page.goto(`${baseUrl}/retailer/promotions`);
  22  |     await page.waitForLoadState('networkidle');
  23  | 
  24  |     // Pick the first promotion title
  25  |     const promoTitle = await page.locator('h3').first().textContent();
  26  |     console.log(`Testing with promotion: ${promoTitle}`);
  27  | 
  28  |     // Opt-in step - only if the button is present
  29  |     const optInBtn = page.locator('button:has-text("Opt In Now")').first();
  30  |     if (await optInBtn.isVisible({ timeout: 3000 }).catch(() => false)) {
  31  |       console.log('Clicking Opt In...');
  32  |       // Use page.on so ALL dialogs (success OR error) are auto-accepted
  33  |       page.on('dialog', dialog => dialog.accept());
  34  |       await optInBtn.click();
  35  |       // Wait for API + re-render — reload guarantees fresh state
  36  |       await page.waitForTimeout(2000);
  37  |       await page.reload();
  38  |       await page.waitForLoadState('networkidle');
  39  |     }
  40  | 
  41  |     // After reload: verify "Opted In" button is present (the fix to PromotionsWall.jsx makes this work now)
  42  |     await expect(page.locator('button:has-text("Opted In")').first()).toBeVisible({ timeout: 10000 });
  43  |     console.log('Opt-in confirmed.');
  44  | 
  45  |     // Rate Campaign step - only if not already rated
  46  |     const rateBtn = page.locator('button:has-text("Rate Campaign")').first();
  47  |     if (await rateBtn.isVisible({ timeout: 3000 }).catch(() => false)) {
  48  |       console.log('Submitting Sales Report...');
  49  |       await rateBtn.click();
  50  |       await page.fill('input[placeholder*="products sold today"]', '500');
  51  |       // Set rating slider to 8
  52  |       await page.evaluate(() => {
  53  |         const slider = document.querySelector('input[type="range"]');
  54  |         if (slider) {
  55  |           const nativeInputValueSetter = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(window.HTMLInputElement.prototype, 'value').set;
  56  |           nativeInputValueSetter.call(slider, '8');
  57  |           slider.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true }));
  58  |         }
  59  |       });
  60  |       await page.fill('textarea[placeholder*="Help us improve"]', 'Great sales performance!');
  61  |       
  62  |       page.on('dialog', dialog => dialog.accept());
  63  |       await page.click('button:has-text("Submit Review")');
> 64  |       await page.waitForTimeout(2000);
      |                  ^ Error: page.waitForTimeout: Test ended.
  65  |       await page.reload();
  66  |       await page.waitForLoadState('networkidle');
  67  |       console.log('Sales report submitted.');
  68  |     } else {
  69  |       console.log('Already rated, skipping rate step.');
  70  |     }
  71  | 
  72  |     // 2. PM approves reward
  73  |     await login(page, accounts.pm.email, password);
  74  |     await page.goto(`${baseUrl}/promotion-manager/dashboard`);
  75  |     await page.waitForLoadState('networkidle');
  76  | 
  77  |     const pmPromoCard = page.locator('div.bg-white', { hasText: promoTitle }).first();
  78  |     
  79  |     const salesBtn = pmPromoCard.locator('button:has-text("Sales & Rewards")');
  80  |     if (await salesBtn.isVisible({ timeout: 5000 }).catch(() => false)) {
  81  |       await salesBtn.click();
  82  |     }
  83  | 
  84  |     const approveBtn = pmPromoCard.locator('button:has-text("Approve & Pay")').first();
  85  |     if (await approveBtn.isVisible({ timeout: 5000 }).catch(() => false)) {
  86  |       console.log('Approving reward...');
  87  |       page.on('dialog', dialog => dialog.accept());
  88  |       await approveBtn.click();
  89  |       await page.waitForTimeout(2000);
  90  |       await expect(pmPromoCard.locator('text=Paid').first()).toBeVisible({ timeout: 10000 });
  91  |       console.log('Reward approved!');
  92  |     } else {
  93  |       console.log('No approve button visible - reward may already be paid.');
  94  |       // Still check that there is a "Paid" indicator
  95  |       await expect(pmPromoCard.locator('text=Paid').first()).toBeVisible({ timeout: 5000 });
  96  |     }
  97  |   });
  98  | 
  99  |   test('TC-REWARD-003: Check Rewards Wallet', async ({ page }) => {
  100 |     await login(page, accounts.retailer1.email, password);
  101 |     await page.goto(`${baseUrl}/retailer/promotions`);
  102 |     await page.waitForLoadState('networkidle');
  103 |     
  104 |     await expect(page.locator('text=Rewards Wallet')).toBeVisible();
  105 |     
  106 |     // The wallet shows "X CREDITS" - grab the full text
  107 |     const walletText = await page.locator('.bg-nestle-brown').first().textContent();
  108 |     console.log(`Wallet text: ${walletText}`);
  109 |     
  110 |     // Extract a number from the wallet area
  111 |     const numbers = walletText.match(/[\d,]+/g);
  112 |     const balance = numbers ? parseInt(numbers[0].replace(',', '')) : 0;
  113 |     console.log(`Retailer credit balance: ${balance}`);
  114 |     
  115 |     expect(balance).toBeGreaterThan(0);
  116 |   });
  117 | 
  118 |   test('TC-REWARD-004: Apply credit discount in checkout', async ({ page }) => {
  119 |     await login(page, accounts.retailer1.email, password);
  120 |     await page.goto(`${baseUrl}/retailer/stock-requests`);
  121 |     await page.waitForLoadState('networkidle');
  122 |     
  123 |     // Add one item to cart
  124 |     await page.locator('button:has(svg[class*="lucide-plus"])').first().click();
  125 |     await page.waitForTimeout(500);
  126 |     
  127 |     const applyBtn = page.locator('button:has-text("Apply")');
  128 |     const isEnabled = await applyBtn.isEnabled({ timeout: 5000 }).catch(() => false);
  129 |     
  130 |     if (isEnabled) {
  131 |       await applyBtn.click();
  132 |       await expect(page.locator('text=Applied')).toBeVisible({ timeout: 5000 });
  133 |       await expect(page.locator('text=Credit Discount')).toBeVisible({ timeout: 5000 });
  134 |       console.log('Credits applied successfully.');
  135 |     } else {
  136 |       console.log('Apply button is disabled (user may have no credits). Skipping apply step.');
  137 |       // This is an acceptable outcome if TC-002 has not run or credits are 0
  138 |       throw new Error('Apply button disabled - credits not yet issued. Ensure TC-REWARD-001/002 runs first.');
  139 |     }
  140 |   });
  141 | 
  142 |   test('TC-REWARD-005: Final total calculation verification', async ({ page }) => {
  143 |     await login(page, accounts.retailer1.email, password);
  144 |     await page.goto(`${baseUrl}/retailer/stock-requests`);
  145 |     await page.waitForLoadState('networkidle');
  146 |     
  147 |     await page.locator('button:has(svg[class*="lucide-plus"])').first().click();
  148 |     await page.waitForTimeout(500);
  149 |     
  150 |     // Get subtotal text before applying credits
  151 |     const subtotalEl = page.locator('text=Subtotal').first();
  152 |     const subtotalText = await subtotalEl.textContent();
  153 |     
  154 |     const applyBtn = page.locator('button:has-text("Apply")');
  155 |     await expect(applyBtn).toBeEnabled({ timeout: 5000 });
  156 |     await applyBtn.click();
  157 |     
  158 |     await page.waitForTimeout(1000);
  159 |     
  160 |     // Get total after credits applied
  161 |     const totalText = await page.locator('text=Total').last().textContent();
  162 |     const subtotal = parseFloat(subtotalText.replace(/[^\d.]/g, ''));
  163 |     const total = parseFloat(totalText.replace(/[^\d.]/g, ''));
  164 |     
```
